home.sheet_helper: Choose a constellation to switch focus quickly.

settings.title: Settings
settings.export_hint: Create a local JSON backup file.
settings.import_hint: Restore data from a backup file.
settings.import_pending: Import flow will be available in STX-045.
settings.about_mission_content: StarNyx is designed to help you build lasting habits through a minimal, focused, and visually rewarding experience. We believe that progress should feel like watching a beautiful night sky grow brighter every day.
settings.about_privacy_content: Your data is yours alone. StarNyx is 100% offline, meaning no accounts, no tracking, and no cloud syncing. All your progress is stored only on your device.
settings.about_experience_content: Inspired by the stars, our interface aims to reduce noise and keep you focused on what matters most: your daily journey towards a better version of yourself.
settings.about_made_with: Made with ❤️ for a better self.
